title: The Noisy Upstairs Neighbor
content: Late at night, Daniel heard loud footsteps coming from the apartment upstairs again. Furniture moved across the floor, and music played loudly for hours. Daniel tried to ignore the noise, but it became impossible to sleep. Finally, he decided to visit his neighbor politely. The neighbor opened the door and immediately apologized. He explained that he was assembling new furniture for his apartment. After their conversation, the noise stopped completely. Daniel returned home feeling relieved and happy that the problem ended peacefully.
